comment: POST /v1/payments/confirm — req {paymentKey, orderId, amount} + Idempotency-Key header.
Backend parses only lastTransactionKey out of a 2xx; everything else here is
harmless realism (@JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown=true) on all response records).
The lognormal delay is the point of this mock: it reproduces the outbound-call
latency that puts pressure on the payment service's threads and connection pool.
median is rewritten at container start from LT_PG_DELAY_MEDIAN_MS (see
docker-compose.loadtest.yml) - keep the literal `"median": 300` intact for that sed.
